use_codes.desc: CYTALUX IS AN OPTICAL IMAGING AGENT INDICATED IN ADULT PATIENTS WITH OVARIAN CANCER AS AN ADJUNCT FOR INTRAOPERATIVE IDENTIFICATION OF MALIGNANT LESIONS
